# AES-DSD-PROJECT

This is a Vivado project for the Artix-7 FPGA board.

## Getting Started

1. Clone the repository.
2. Open Vivado.
3. Open the `AES-DSD-PROJECT.xpr` file.

*Note: The `.cache`, `.runs`, `.sim`, and other auto-generated directories are deliberately excluded from version control to keep the repository size small.*

## Documentation Reference
Check the `/docs` folder for detailed guides and technical information on the project architecture:
- [Hardware Demonstration Guide](docs/hardware_demo_guide.md) - Exact steps for communicating with the Basys 3 board, UART settings, and demonstrating Encryption and Decryption.
- [Architecture & Block Diagrams](docs/block_diagrams.md) - Visual Mermaid charts outlining the AES core, finite state machine, datapath muxes, and the hardware wrapper.
- [Project Verdict](docs/fpga_deployment_verdict.md) - Summary of verification and readiness logic.
